findings.reason: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of main commit 1c356bb (PR #503, the SAFE-NOW private-IP leak CI gate). #503 scrubbed two private tailnet endpoints (http://100.125.77.31:11434, http://100.76.58.50:11434) out of the mocked LIVE_PAYLOAD in this headless smoke-test fixture, replacing them with honest 'sovereign-gpu (scrubbed)' / 'tailnet-gpu (scrubbed)' labels (smoke-test pass count unchanged). GitHub main holds the scrubbed file; the live HF Space still serves the pre-scrub copy until the box redeploys the Docker image. Pre-existing main drift, NOT introduced by the contrast/defer/Server-header hardening commit. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the OIDs reconcile.
